top_findings.title: No date range filtering on match queries — only season filter implemented
top_findings.evidence: tools.go:22-49 search_matches InputSchema defines team1, team2, season, competition, limit but no date_start/date_end parameters; tools.go:224-298 SearchMatches filters by season (line 237) but has no date range logic
top_findings.suggestion: Add date_start and date_end string parameters to search_matches and filter matches by Date field in SearchMatches
